sentence.chinese: 「我的孩子們，這是我最後一次給你們上課，從柏林來了命令，今後在阿爾薩斯和洛林兩省的小學裡，只準教德文了。新教師明天就到，今天，是你們最後一堂法文課，我請你們專心聽講。」這幾句話對我簡直就是晴天霹靂。啊！那些混賬東西，原來他們在村政府前面公布的就是這件事。這是我最後一堂法文課！
sentence.ab: lalaalakeli, kayasaa biibilrilinga ku takelaneli bulru numiya, wakela ku twalai Pulring drekase ka vaga, twalai kayasaa ikay ki kusiau ki Aresase si Lulringi kathanenga ku Deku ka vaga ku abulruwa. ku bauwa ka singisi aikela ludhaa, kayasaa, sakathaanenga ku takibulruwanenumi ki vaga ki Huawenge. la kicacaligiha kilaalalra kay abulruwaneli. kaivay lavaga pakai nakuwa mahudrehedrehenga patumiyamikace iyasasana. aa! wavalracevace lini, ani ka amani kaivay kudra pelaelalini picuucubungu ki swasihu. kaivay kathaanenga biibilrilinga ku akibulrwuaneli ki vaga ki Huawenge!

sentence.chinese: 可是我剛剛勉強會寫！從此，我再也學不到法文了！只能到此為止了！我這時是多麽後悔，後悔過去浪費了光陰，後悔自己逃學去掏鳥窩，到薩爾河上去滑冰！我那幾本書，文法書和聖徒傳，剛才我還覺得背在書包裡那麽討厭，那麼沉甸甸的，現在就像老朋友一樣，叫我捨不得離開。對哈墨爾先生也是這樣。一想到他就要離開這兒，從此再也見不到他了，我就忘記了他以前給我的處罰，忘記了他如何用戒尺打我。
sentence.ab:
ai kiaadilaku nawthingale pwacase miya! twalai ikai, kadruwanga ku adulruwaneli kibulru ki vaga ki Huawenge! lai asakathanenga si alikai ikai! kayasasaa ngyatatakusaulriulriyaku tuhamuhu, ngitatakusaulriyulri ku tapaasaulraneli ku lavai, mulrakaw ki akibulruwa si muhi lisisuku kiadhaadhame, kela talidradha drakehale Saare muthuuthulungu ki paasabu! kudra lahunguli, kakuwakudha ki vaga, abuubulru ki kiasusuusu, kuasaa malraseananaku si tatielrege elrai pikabanga, yathahuludru katielrege, 
[===]
kayasasaa lamyaki maulainga ku tamatalragiyanenai, lakavalringivingi tuahamuhu. pangukai ki singsi ka Hamuare miyalri. 
[---]
sanakidremedremaku iniya ka aidavacenga kidaili twalai ikai, lai kaidu macaceecelenga iniya, sakaulraunga kudra natapangimiyaneini pathavungu nakuwa, kahimuhu lupangiatuma ahakai ku sadadameke sitiiti nakuwa.

sentence.chinese: 這個可憐的人啊！原來他是為了上最後一堂課，才穿上漂亮的節日服裝，而現在我也明白了，為什麽村裡的老人今天都來坐在教室的盡頭，這好像是告訴我們，他們後悔過去到這小學裡來得太少。這好像是為了向我們的老師表示感謝，感謝他四十年來勤勤懇懇為學校服務，也像是為了對即將離去的祖國表示他們的心意。
sentence.ab:
ala matiakuhu kay umase kay! alanika pasiakailringa ikay ki biibilrilinga ku abulrwaneini, lakuni ku ngihagelaneini ikay sangihagelana ki tasukusukuba ki Niciwbi, latau pulringalringavaku, ku kela ikay latahudrawdrange ki cekele makitu takaenene ikay lrilrikudru ki takibulrubulruwa, kayvai myaki amyamiya ikay naiya, ngiatatakusaulriyulri ku siasuwala ku kadruwaka tangusipiyapiyala kela ikay kusyaw. 
[===]
miaki aikiaseasene sukubu ki singisinai maelanengamiya iniya, kiaseasene iniya ku nitaha masupatela ka caili kisamula kageteme pasikai ki gaku, lamialrika aipasikai ki aikidailinga ikay cekele ki nacekeleini  paathingala ku takidremedremanelini.
